rulings.Case Title: JUAN VILLAREAL VS. ARNOLD JAVIER CANALES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 25, 2019 line 8. PLAINTIFF JUAN VILLAREAL MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. No evidence provide that Notice of Termination has been served or that Defendants currently remains in possession of the property. The Court notes that the Notice of Motion references counsel declaration as the basis for the motion, however there is no declaration of counsel in support of the motion on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEFF MOSLEY VS. HOMERO ROCHON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-19-579925 WITH CASE CUD-19-666014
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 25, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT HOMERO ROCHAN, DORI ROCHAN MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-19-579925 WITH CASE CUD-19-666014 is GRANTED. Issues to be addressed in this cases involve a complex issue of title. Plaintiff's arguments regarding the sufficiency and validity of defendant's claims are premature and should be addressed by appropriate motions in 579925 action. Until such time the actions are consolidated, and if the circumstances change, Plaintiff will have an opportunity to sever the actions and lift the stay. = (501/REQ)
